arts.ttl: “Made me feel very loved” – Player on ‘not easy decision’ to leave Manchester City, how manager seduced him
arts.sum: Julián Alvarez has told Saturday’s edition of Marca that it wasn’t easy for him to leave Manchester City for Atlético Madrid in the summer window. The striker spent two seasons at the Etihad, winning the treble in his debut season and the title last season. Alvarez managed 36 goals and 18 assists from 106 matches The post “Made me feel very loved” – Player on ‘not easy decision’ to leave Manchester City, how manager seduced him appeared first on Sport Witness.

They have been inconsistent this season and the poor form of striker Ollie Watkins has been a huge concern for manager Unai Emery.
